GeneTerrain Documentation

OwnerHHari Merla
Tags
Created time@Sept 05, 2024 10:49 AM

GeneTerrain:

Geneterrain is data visualization software which built to draw various plots based on gene expression and clinical data of cancer patients. This software is built using Typescript, WebGPU and Node js. Other tools used are AG-Grid, PlotlyJS, OpenAI.

Releases:

Version: 0.0.1

Sources:

  1. code: https://github.com/aimed-lab/GeneTerrain-Web-APP
  1. Website: https://138.26.49.153/

Tabs:

  1. Basic
  1. Compare
  1. Pathway
  1. Pathway Details
  1. Network
  1. Slider
  1. API

Basic:

A table of clinical samples of patients are displayed here. Select the samples and click generate from filters section to draw heatmap for selected samples.

  1. AG-Grid Samples:

  1. Result:

Compare:

This is similar to Basic tab. Instead we draw two Geneterrain’s inorder to draw comparision between each other.

Once two geneterrian’s are generated, drag and selected any area from one geneterrain. Genes related to selected region are show in both geneterrain’s.

  1. AG-Grid samples:
  1. Result:

  1. Bar plots for selected genes:

    Note

Pathway:

Selected genes and its properties are displayed here in pathway tab. Once user selects genes and clicks on generate, those genes are sent to Pager API to fetch PAG’s related to the selected genes.

Resulted PAG’s are show in form of customized plotly box plot.

Further from the returned PAG’s result data, we can also draw customized bar plot between PAG name and its log pvalue. check below.

Network(Beta):

As we got PAG’s information for selected genes, we draw a network showing PAG name as node and no of genes related between two PAG’s as edges. Network is drawn using javascript cytoscape library.

Pathway Details(Beta):

We have PAG’s information for selected genes. In this tab when we select any PAG id, from the selected genes from compare tab which are part of selected PAG id from current tab are shown in the geneterrain. Lets say common genes.

When user clicks on generate, new geneterrain is drawn from common genes mainly focusing on showing peak and valley regions.

Slider:

Slider is used to show two plots as one plot where there is a slider to move left and right used to compare both plots. please check below.

API(Beta):

Access to OpenAI gpt3 model to answer question related to any selected genes from user. This is still in development mode.
